title: NIAB Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: BRIC-National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) Senior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 14 May 2026 on the official website niab.org.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIAB Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MVSc. / M.Tech. / MSc. Degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Immunology with 2 years' experience in R&D in the related area. NET/GATE qualified as per DST Guidelines.
qualification.details: MVSc. / M.Tech. / MSc. Degree in Biotechnology/Biochemistry/Microbiology/Immunology with 2 years' experience in R&D in the related area. NET/GATE qualified as per DST Guidelines.

selection_process: Screening Interview by duly constituted selection committee
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIAB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIAB Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Senior Research Fellow position at NIAB is June 4, 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MVSc., M.Tech., or MSc. degree in Biotechnology, Biochemistry, Microbiology, or Immunology. Additionally, 2 years of R&D experience in a relevant field and NET/GATE qualification are mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants applying for the Senior Research Fellow position is 35 years. Specific age relaxations may apply as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates for the Senior Research Fellow position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 42,000 per month, plus applicable HRA if eligible.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the NIAB recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position involves an initial screening of applications, followed by an interview conducted by a duly constituted selection committee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the nature of the job at NIAB?
faq.answer: The job for the Senior Research Fellow position at NIAB is on a contractual basis. This means the appointment is for a fixed term, as specified in the offer letter.

faq.question: Q8. Where is NIAB located?
faq.answer: BRIC-National Institute of Animal Biotechnology (NIAB) is located in Hyderabad, Telangana, with the pincode 500032.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates from outside Telangana apply for this position?
faq.answer: The notification specifies that applications are invited from eligible candidates in Telangana. However, it is advisable to check the detailed notification for any specific domicile requirements.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Senior Research Fellow recruitment at NIAB is 12 / 2026. This number should be used for any official correspondence.
